data.name: Cute Cute Cuties
data.detailed_description:
Help the beautiful girls to immerse themselves in their memories and remember the wonderful moments of their lives. This game is a classic memory game with several levels of difficulty and beautiful arts. All characters appearing in this game are over 18 years of age. Enjoy ;-)

- Memory Game

- Artworks

- Nice music

- Steam achievements

Keyboard H: Complete Level

data.short_description: This game is a classic memory game with several levels of difficulty and beautiful arts. All characters appearing in this game are over 18 years of age. Enjoy ;-)

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7 32-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 2 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 Gb
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7 32-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD processor, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 Gb
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
